name: sma-v08
description: KOTEA (V08) - central hub API + display app, with separate offline-first POS and Expense satellite apps (React + Vite + Supabase Postgres)

scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev -- --host"
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && pkg launcher.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output KOTEA.exe
scripts.build:pos-exe: npm run build && pkg launcher.pos.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output KOTEA-POS.exe
scripts.build:expense-exe: npm run build && pkg launcher.expense.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output KOTEA-Expense.exe
scripts.build:all-exe: npm run build && pkg launcher.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output KOTEA.exe && pkg launcher.pos.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output KOTEA-POS.exe && pkg launcher.expense.cjs --targets node22-win-x64 --output KOTEA-Expense.exe
